profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ Midland TX — outside WWT STOLA territory (West Texas, not Houston metro). Channel mismatch flag applied.

signals.signal_title: Diamondback Energy electric simul-frac fleet — VoltaGrid + Halliburton 200MW partnership December 2024
signals.signal_description: Diamondback Energy deployed a 200MW electric simul-frac fleet in the Permian Basin via a partnership with VoltaGrid (power supply) and Halliburton (frac services) in December 2024. Electric simul-frac is a leading OT technology signal — requires significant power management, automation, and real-time monitoring infrastructure.

signals.signal_title: Diamondback continuous real-time methane monitoring — 87% of crude production covered
signals.signal_description: Diamondback Energy deployed continuous real-time methane monitoring covering approximately 87% of its crude oil production. Real-time environmental monitoring at this scale requires IoT sensor networks, data telemetry, and analytics infrastructure. Confirms active OT/digital investment in field operations.

signals.signal_title: Diamondback $26B Endeavor Energy merger closed September 2024 — active post-merger IT integration
signals.signal_description: Diamondback closed its transformational $26B merger with Endeavor Energy Resources in September 2024, doubling its Permian Basin acreage. Post-merger IT integration across ERP, field operations systems, production data, and land records creates significant near-term IT spend demand.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $14.46B post-Endeavor merger. ~1,983 employees — very lean for revenue scale. Midland TX HQ = channel mismatch (West Texas, not Houston metro). No CIO identified. Electric operations and real-time monitoring are meaningful OT technology signals. Post-Endeavor IT integration ($26B deal) = active IT demand. No MSP or CoE. Halliburton relationship via VoltaGrid is noteworthy — WWT + Halliburton strategic alignment could be an entry point. ai_maturity_score=8 (below ≥15). Confidence MEDIUM.
